objectives.text: Search the chapel. Learn who they are and what they preach.
Break the cult that has taken the chapel.
Follow the road to the Hallowfen wall.

stages.description: A cult has taken the quarantine chapel on the Hallowfen road. Find out who they are and what they want.
Their own ledger names them the Choir of the Open Wound, a cult no Censure file has ever recorded, and marks the Hallowfen wall as their next ground.
The altar was set for a feeding. End the cell before it raises another saint.
A hidden service cellar runs beneath the split barrel.
The chapel cell is broken. The trail runs down the road to the Hallowfen wall.
